mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN w.warning_level = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS highRiskCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN w.handle_status IN (0, 1, 2) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingHandleCount FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w WHERE w.is_deleted = 0

SELECT w.warning_id AS alertId, w.warning_time AS warningTime, w.warning_level AS alertLevel, CASE w.warning_level WHEN 1 THEN '低危' WHEN 2 THEN '中危' WHEN 3 THEN '高危' ELSE '未知' END AS alertLevelText, w.handle_status AS alertStatus, CASE w.handle_status WHEN 0 THEN '待确认' WHEN 1 THEN '待处理' WHEN 2 THEN '处理中' WHEN 3 THEN '已处理' WHEN 4 THEN '已忽略' ELSE '未知' END AS alertStatusText, w.patient_name AS patientName, COALESCE(w.age, p.age) AS age, CASE WHEN w.gender IS NOT NULL AND w.gender != '' THEN w.gender WHEN p.gender = 1 THEN '男' WHEN p.gender = 2 THEN '女' ELSE '未知' END AS genderText, w.inpatient_no AS inpatientNo, w.dept_name AS wardName, w.warning_type AS warningType, w.warning_desc AS warningDesc, a.ai_conclusion AS aiConclusion, COALESCE(p.primary_diagnosis, '暂无临床表现记录') AS clinicalManifestation, CASE w.warning_level WHEN 3 THEN '建议关联检查：肌钙蛋白、CK-MB、电解质、D-二聚体' WHEN 2 THEN '建议关联检查：心肌酶谱、电解质、BNP' ELSE '建议结合常规检验结果进行综合评估' END AS lisHint, w.handle_user_name AS handleUserName, w.handle_time AS handleTime, w.handle_opinion AS handleRemark FROM ecg_abnormal_warning w LEFT JOIN ecg_ai_diagnosis a ON w.ai_diagnosis_id = a.ai_diagnosis_id AND a.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN patient_info p ON w.patient_id = p.patient_id AND p.is_deleted = 0 WHERE w.warning_id = #{alertId} AND w.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE ecg_abnormal_warning SET handle_status = 3, handle_user_name = #{handleUserName}, handle_time = NOW(), handle_opinion = #{handleRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE warning_id = #{alertId} AND is_deleted = 0
